title: polyalthia cambodica
intro: Polyalthia cambodica, also known as Cambodian polyalthia or Cambodian starfruit tree, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polyalthia cambodica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
